patch:
--- a/comparator.sv
+++ b/comparator.sv
@@ -10,10 +10,10 @@ module comparator_16bit(
 module chip(
   input [15:0] bus_a, bus_b,
   output eq_flag
 );
-  comparator_16bit cmp_inst (
-    .input_a(bus_a),
-    .input_b(bus_b),
-    .equal(eq_flag)
+  comparator_16bit cmp_inst (
+    .a(bus_a),
+    .b(bus_b),
+    .is_equal(eq_flag)
   );
 endmodule
